mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for workers compensation settlements in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Jon Michael Bonnesen at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in workers compensation settlements serving Salt Lake City. Since 2017, Jon has dedicated his legal career to managing a high-volume civil litigation caseload. He is actively involved in every stage of the litigation process—from initial client intake to filings, discovery, hearings, trials, and strategic settlement negotiations. Known for his practical approach and strong advocacy, Jon consistently achieves favorable outcomes for his clients. Contact us at 801-746-0290.

mainEntity.name: Does Jon Michael Bonnesen handle workers compensation settlements cases in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Jon Michael Bonnesen at Just Work Comp Law specializes in workers compensation settlements and serves clients in Salt Lake City and surrounding areas.
